recommended_sprint_split.name: 5 Ngũ Hành Reactions + Post component X.com-grade
recommended_sprint_split.rationale: CORE UZG+ DNA — most differentiated feature. Ship together since both touch the post card.

recommended_sprint_split.name: Post Detail + Comments System
recommended_sprint_split.rationale: Deep engagement. Post detail page provides surface for comments — ship together.

recommended_sprint_split.name: Lightbox + Composer media upload
recommended_sprint_split.rationale: Rich content authoring + viewing. Both touch media handling.

recommended_sprint_split.name: Profile Preview + Connect 4 trust levels + Share/Quote
recommended_sprint_split.rationale: Social graph actions. Profile preview surfaces connect.

recommended_sprint_split.name: Notifications + Suggested Resonance + Realtime + AC-1 verification
recommended_sprint_split.rationale: Real-time + final integration. Includes AC-1 18-step PASS verification.

blockers_inhibiting_remaining_work: None at infrastructure level — V2 endpoints documented, Phase 6.1.b auth bypass functional, Playwright harness reusable
kl_extensions_this_sprint: KL-067 NEW: V3 client field mapping must follow V2 canonical service (productV2Service.js), not V3 type definitions. Both ENDGAME-1 read crash and ENDGAME-2 composer bug were V3↔V2 field-name mismatches.
KL-068 NEW: Cannot-complete IS a finding (mirror of KL-051). When task scope exceeds single-session capacity, honest partial + handoff blocker > fabricated completion.
